nasb.text: *got up from supper, and *laid aside His garments; and taking a towel, He girded Himself.

esv.text: rose from supper. He laid aside his outer garments, and taking a towel, tied it around his waist.

cnv.text: 就起身離席，脫去外衣，拿一條手巾束腰。

ccb.text: 就离席站起来，脱了外衣，把毛巾束在腰间，

csbs.text: 他从席位上起身，脱了外衣，拿起一条布巾束在自己腰上，
